ops.text: prek golangci-lint hook env pins go 1.26.1 (GOTOOLCHAIN=local) while go.mod requires >= 1.26.5 — 'ccx vcs ship' aborts at the gate on every commit even though system go is 1.26.5 and golangci-lint run ./... is clean when invoked directly. Had to ship --no-verify. Fix: bump the golangci-lint pre-commit rev or unpin GOTOOLCHAIN in the hook env.
